title: SessionReceipt
description: The final outcome record for a completed AgentSession. Records the terminal status, all produced artifacts, execution decisions, and gate results.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

sessionRef.description: URN of the AgentSession this receipt summarises. Pattern: urn:srcos:session:<id>

status.description: Terminal status of the session: success, failure, paused, deferred, or canceled.

artifactRefs.description: References to artifacts produced by the session (e.g. PRs, files, reports).

decisionRefs.description: URNs of all ExecutionDecisions recorded during the session. Pattern: urn:srcos:exec-decision:<id>

gateResults.description: Identifiers of post-session gate checks and their outcomes.

capturedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this receipt was recorded.
